title: Sovereign Corporate Capability Foundry
subtitle: From autonomous proof missions to portfolio-level corporate capability compounding
canonical_statement: GoalOS-native alpha-AGI Ascension can coordinate large specialist-agent portfolios that discover, test, prove, review, settle, select, and reinvest improvements across sovereign corporate domains - converting verified work into reusable capability, productive capacity, and stronger future missions.
incremental_delta_from_pc007: Proof Card 007 proved an autoresearch reactor: parallel proof missions, evaluator harnesses, review, selection, and chronicle memory. Proof Card 008 upgrades that reactor into a corporate capability foundry: a portfolio-level institution that allocates AGIALPHA-coordinated budgets across profitable sovereign domains, measures alpha-Work Units, compounds accepted artifacts, and reinvests verified value into stronger future missions.

roles.purpose: Sets sovereign corporate goals, risk class, authority, and success criteria.
Selects high-value domains and allocates mandate epochs.
Surfaces workflow opportunity, market pressure, and enterprise pain points.
Proposes candidate improvements and proof missions.
Execute workflow, model, contract, data, and operational artifacts.
Run benchmarks, cost tests, safety checks, and variance controls.
Assemble ProofBundles, public-safe hashes, and Evidence Dockets.
Validates claims under rubrics and challenge windows.
Attempts falsification, reward-hack discovery, and unsafe-claim rejection.
Routes verified value into capability budgets and reward vaults.
Grants scoped upgrade rights only to artifacts that survived evidence.
Defines recovery paths, canaries, reversibility, and incident response.
Records durable memory so future missions do not relearn solved work.

skills.explanation: Break a corporate objective into proof missions that can be executed, tested, and reviewed.
Allocate budget, agents, and evaluator harnesses across competing high-value opportunities.
Generate candidate improvements while preserving scope, risk, and rollback constraints.
Convert claims into measurable tests, variance controls, and anti-reward-hack checks.
Assemble ProofBundles, public-safe hashes, and Evidence Dockets.
Validate evidence under a rubric and challenge window.
Try to break claims before artifacts receive upgrade rights.
Coordinate mission posting, bonds, rewards, credentials, reputation, and vault entries.
Route verified value into stronger future missions and capability budgets.
Keep upgrades reversible and scope-limited until proven safe.
Record what worked so future missions can reuse it instead of relearning it.
Grant future influence only to artifacts that survived evidence and review.

plans.explanation: Define the sovereign corporate period, domains, budgets, risk classes, and required proof outputs.
Prioritize procurement, finance, compliance, support, security, operations, energy, and compute workflows.
Turn each domain opportunity into goal, metric, bounty, proof requirement, evaluator, and reviewer rubric.
Specify posting fees, claim bonds, proof bonds, reviewer bonds, rewards, credentials, and reputation updates.
Define baselines, acceptance thresholds, replay requirements, variance checks, and safety controls.
Decide when a candidate artifact earns scoped upgrade rights or is rejected.
Route validated value into compute, tools, audits, data, stronger agents, and new proof missions.
Define canary scope, monitoring, reversal triggers, recovery targets, and incident evidence.

goals.explanation: Grow output that is measurable, reusable, and audit-backed.
Use chronicle memory and accepted artifacts to avoid relearning solved workflows.
Convert due diligence, procurement, compliance, and audit concerns into proof artifacts.
Select upgrades only when evidence, safety, and rollback conditions are satisfied.
Route aim, strategy, builders, evaluators, reviewers, treasury, rollback, and evidence roles to maximum effect.
Use AGIALPHA to coordinate proof-settled work, credentials, reputation, and capability budgets.
Accumulate Evidence Dockets, Proof Cards, credentials, reviewer records, and chronicles.
Reinvest verified value into stronger future capability while preserving claim boundaries.

claim_boundary: This is an experimental proof framework and public usage example. It does not claim achieved AGI, achieved superintelligence, guaranteed ROI, legal approval, tax approval, security approval, Ethereum mainnet deployment, or Kardashev Type II achievement. The civilizational horizon is expressed as a bounded reinvestment thesis, not a present achievement.
